title: New Member Introduction – Excited to Join the Community

posts.author: lindsy12 (Cluadia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

My name is Lindsy, and I’m excited to be part of the monday.com community. I’m new to the platform and currently exploring its capabilities for project management and team collaboration.

I joined the forum to learn from experienced users, ask thoughtful questions, and hopefully contribute valuable insights over time as I become more familiar with the tools.

I appreciate how active and helpful this community appears to be, and I look forward to connecting and growing here.

If you have any recommendations for must-read discussions, helpful guides, or resources for beginners, I’d be grateful for any suggestions.

Thanks for the warm welcome in advance!

Best regard

  • Lindsy

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Welcome! I highly recommend the academy monday academy | Skills, Training, Courses, Webinars & Certifications

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lindsy! Hope you’ll enjoy monday and the community!

I would add to the list checking the app marketplace. Sometimes when you think monday is missing some feature that is crucial for you, there might be an app that solves that problem
